content.text: Flex sizing begins with each item’s flex base and hypothetical size, then distributes positive free space by flex-grow or negative free space by scaled flex-shrink factors while respecting min and max constraints. Flex: 1 commonly expands to a zero basis pattern, but automatic minimum content size can still prevent shrinking unless constraints such as min-inline-size zero are deliberate. Apply it to survey action widths and long-label overflow incident.
